Coven matriarch who speaks to the dead and they always answer
Exiled dark queen plotting her bloody return from a crumbling castle
Hedge witch who grows poison in moonlight and sells curses at dawn
Storm-witch who dances barefoot in lightning and commands the thunder
Noblewoman who buried three husbands and just married her fourth
Oracle who reads futures in candle smoke and laughs at what burns
Woman cursed to never age while everyone she loves turns to dust
Wild thing raised by wolves in a forest where nothing else lives
Death-priestess who performs last rites and decides who deserves them
Countess who holds court at midnight in an abandoned cathedral
Shadow-binder who weaves darkness like silk and wears it as armor
Warlord's widow who claimed his army and made them fear her more
Bone-reader who knows your death date and will tell you for a price
Ghost-bride who walks the same moonlit corridor every midnight for centuries
Occult scholar with ink-stained fingers and knowledge that should stay buried
Dark abbess whose convent of nuns are loyal dangerous and bound by blood oaths
Creature who hunts the moors at dusk and sleeps in forgotten crypts
Banshee whose scream shatters church glass and curdles milk three villages over
Berserker priestess painted in ash who leads rituals under the black moon
Immortal woman trapped in a painting for centuries and freshly freed with vengeance
Fortune-teller who charges in secrets not coin and always collects her due
Keeper of a cathedral where no god lives but something else does
The thing that lives in the bell tower and only comes down when summoned
Poison-maker to queens who knows which mushrooms grant visions and which grant widowhood
Witch-queen who bound her soul to ravens and sees through their black eyes
